title: Eidolons SWE-task-solving Harness Suite
description: Consumed by `eidolons eval swe`. Each task is a broken repo + a red test + (for the smoke) a deterministic reference fix. The harness drives `eidolons sandbox loop` per task and records resolved/unresolved. The bundled suite is a HARNESS SELF-TEST, not a capability benchmark — a real number needs an external suite + a model --fix-hook + a real --via sandbox.

setup.description: Shell run in the empty per-task workdir to materialise the broken repo state.

test.description: Shell test command: RED before the fix, GREEN after. Run via a script so pipes/&& work.

gold_fix.description: Deterministic reference fix used as the fix-hook in smoke mode (no model). Omit for external suites driven by a real --fix-hook.
